<!-- spec-lite:start -->
## spec-lite Sub-Agents

This project uses [spec-lite](https://github.com/abranjith/spec-lite) sub-agent prompts
for structured software engineering workflows.

The following specialist sub-agents are available:

**Agent files** (`.github/agents/`) — select from the agents dropdown in Copilot Chat:

- [spec.architect](.github/agents/spec.architect.agent.md)
- [spec.brainstorm](.github/agents/spec.brainstorm.agent.md)
- [spec.code_review](.github/agents/spec.code_review.agent.md)
- [spec.data_modeller](.github/agents/spec.data_modeller.agent.md)
- [spec.devops](.github/agents/spec.devops.agent.md)
- [spec.explore](.github/agents/spec.explore.agent.md)
- [spec.feature](.github/agents/spec.feature.agent.md)
- [spec.fix](.github/agents/spec.fix.agent.md)
- [spec.implement](.github/agents/spec.implement.agent.md)
- [spec.integration_tests](.github/agents/spec.integration_tests.agent.md)
- [spec.memorize](.github/agents/spec.memorize.agent.md)
- [spec.performance_review](.github/agents/spec.performance_review.agent.md)
- [spec.planner](.github/agents/spec.planner.agent.md)
- [spec.readme](.github/agents/spec.readme.agent.md)
- [spec.security_audit](.github/agents/spec.security_audit.agent.md)
- [spec.spec_help](.github/agents/spec.spec_help.agent.md)
- [spec.technical_docs](.github/agents/spec.technical_docs.agent.md)
- [spec.unit_tests](.github/agents/spec.unit_tests.agent.md)
- [spec.yolo](.github/agents/spec.yolo.agent.md)

**Prompt files** (`.github/prompts/`) — reference with `#file` or browse with `/`:

- [architect](.github/prompts/architect.prompt.md)
- [brainstorm](.github/prompts/brainstorm.prompt.md)
- [code_review](.github/prompts/code_review.prompt.md)
- [data_modeller](.github/prompts/data_modeller.prompt.md)
- [devops](.github/prompts/devops.prompt.md)
- [explore](.github/prompts/explore.prompt.md)
- [feature](.github/prompts/feature.prompt.md)
- [fix](.github/prompts/fix.prompt.md)
- [implement](.github/prompts/implement.prompt.md)
- [integration_tests](.github/prompts/integration_tests.prompt.md)
- [memorize](.github/prompts/memorize.prompt.md)
- [performance_review](.github/prompts/performance_review.prompt.md)
- [planner](.github/prompts/planner.prompt.md)
- [readme](.github/prompts/readme.prompt.md)
- [security_audit](.github/prompts/security_audit.prompt.md)
- [spec_help](.github/prompts/spec_help.prompt.md)
- [technical_docs](.github/prompts/technical_docs.prompt.md)
- [unit_tests](.github/prompts/unit_tests.prompt.md)
- [yolo](.github/prompts/yolo.prompt.md)

To invoke a sub-agent, select it from the agents dropdown or use `#file` to reference a prompt file.
<!-- spec-lite:end -->
